title: hieracium bifidum subsp. obtextifolium
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. obtextifolium, also known as the lesser hawk's beard, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium bifidum subsp. obtextifolium include its potential to aid in the treatment of colds, flu, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Hieracium bifidum subsp. obtextifolium can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with the dried leaves and flowers being commonly used in herbal remedies.
